corrections.text: The article attributes several specific CALYPSO trial-readout numbers to Pharmaceutical Executive — including the 31.1% versus 5.9% primary-endpoint hit rates, the n=41/132 and n=4/68 patient counts, the p-value of 0.0001, the 8.3 to 10.6 mg/dL albumin-adjusted serum-calcium range, and the 600 mg/day oral-calcium ceiling. Those specific numbers come from the AstraZeneca press release as published via Mirage News (also cited in the article), not from Pharmaceutical Executive's earlier 18 March 2025 topline-readout coverage, which only reported that the trial met statistical significance without those specific numerical results. The numerical facts themselves are correct; the attribution is misallocated.
